text:
- Update to 2.7.11
- Changed pkg-plist
- Added variable WWWDIR
- Changed owner and group for variables WWWOWN and WWWGRP 
- Changed directory of /usr/local/www/data/uebimiau to /usr/local/www/uebimiau
